title: This little champ needs a forever home
description: GEORGE NEWS - Champie needs a forever home...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Champie needs a forever home urgently. He is a lively four-month-old pup full of love and joy.


> Bought off the street two months ago by a nursing sister who rescued him, he is now at the Garden Route SPCA.


Unfortunately, his rescuer couldn't keep him and it broke her heart.

She visits him often, but he needs a home of his own where he can run and play. He will be medium to large once he is grown.

His rescuer will donate towards his adoption fee, as long as he goes to a family that will love him for the rest of his life.
